name: ai.autousers/mcp
description: Evaluate UX with AI personas and human raters — directly from chat. List/create/inspect Autousers evaluations, fetch ratings, manage templates, run autouser personas, share review links.

environmentVariables.name: AUTOUSERS_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://app.autousers.ai. Set to http://localhost:3000 for local development.
